_comment: Manifest of Learning Atlas subjects. The hub home (index.html) renders its cards from this file, so adding a subject is a data change here — no HTML edits. status: 'live' links to href; 'soon' renders a disabled Coming-soon card. icon: a hub glyph name (GLYPHS in index.html) or a literal emoji rendered as text — Mathematics keeps its original ➗.

subjects.name: History
subjects.description: Eight conflicts from the French & Indian War to the Cold War — animated borders, battles, leaders and treaties on an interactive world map.

subjects.name: Sciences
subjects.description: Indiana-aligned science by grade (2023 standards) — matter and its particles, forces and energy, ecosystems and Earth’s systems, taught through models you can run. Includes the interactive Biology explorer with its cells, DNA and plant-cell 3-D model. Explore, discover and master; each concept unlocks the next.

subjects.name: Mathematics
subjects.description: A knowledge map of interactive lessons — counting, fractions, arrays, the coordinate plane and function machines. Explore, discover and master; each concept unlocks the next.

subjects.name: English
subjects.description: Language and literature — grammar, rhetoric, poetic form and the stories that shaped them.

subjects.name: Geography
subjects.description: Physical and human geography — climate, tectonics, biomes and the shape of nations.
